# ObviousBench

ObviousBench v0.1 is a frozen 224-question, 223 model/settings snapshot. Static scores are dated artifacts, not permanent model-family rankings.

## Explore

- Static report: `docs/reports/2026-06-03-paper-v1-8x28-current-223-final/report.html`
- Leaderboard CSV: `docs/reports/2026-06-03-paper-v1-8x28-current-223-final/leaderboard.csv`
- Effort/cost curves: `docs/reports/2026-06-02-effort-cost-curves/index.html`
